skill_content:
# Azure CLI

The Azure CLI is installed and authenticated via service principal.

## Common commands

```bash
# Resource groups
az group list --output table
az group create --name myRG --location eastus

# Virtual machines
az vm list --output table
az vm start --resource-group myRG --name myVM
az vm stop --resource-group myRG --name myVM

# Storage
az storage account list --output table
az storage blob upload --account-name myAccount --container-name myContainer --file data.csv --name data.csv

# App Service
az webapp list --output table
az webapp log tail --resource-group myRG --name myApp

# Key Vault
az keyvault secret list --vault-name myVault
az keyvault secret show --vault-name myVault --name mySecret

# Container instances
az container list --output table
```

## Output formats
Use `--output json|table|tsv|yaml` or `--query` (JMESPath) to filter results.
